story.iWant: to view the generated script for a lesson
story.soThat: I can review the content before generating audio

subtasks.subtask: Create src/app/courses/[slug]/lessons/[id]/script/page.tsx
Page delegates to ScriptPreview container
Extract slug and id from route params
Create src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/index.tsx
Create src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/connect.ts with useConnect hook
Create src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/types.ts for local types
Create src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/constants.ts for constants
Use $api.useQuery to fetch lesson data: GET /api/courses/{slug}/lessons
Handle loading state with skeleton
Handle error state with retry functionality
Create ScriptContent component in src/components/ScriptContent.tsx
Parse script array (ScriptPartResponse[])
Render speak parts as styled paragraphs
Render pause parts as visual badges with duration
Apply proper spacing between parts
Create utility function calculateScriptMetrics(script: ScriptPart[])
Calculate word count from speak parts
Calculate character count from speak parts
Calculate estimated reading time (words / 150 for meditation pace)
Display metrics in a subtle info bar
Add "Edit Script" button (navigates to edit route or shows placeholder)
Add "Generate Audio" button with conditional disabled state
Add tooltip on disabled "Generate Audio" explaining prerequisite
Add "Regenerate Script" button (placeholder for Story 4.5)
Add "Back to Course" button with proper navigation

task.title: Implement Empty State for No Script

subtasks.subtask: Create empty state component with status-specific messaging
Show appropriate icon and description based on lesson status
Add CTA button to navigate back to course
Use Tailwind responsive classes for layout adaptation
Stack action buttons on mobile
Ensure readable typography at all breakpoints
Test at mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors
Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors
Manual test: Navigate to script page for lesson with completed script
Manual test: Verify script content renders correctly (speak + pause parts)
Manual test: Verify metrics display correctly
Manual test: Verify action buttons work (navigation, disabled states)
Manual test: Verify empty state for lessons without script
Manual test: Verify error state on API failure
Manual test: Verify responsive behavior on mobile

criterion.given: a lesson has status SCRIPT_COMPLETED or higher (e.g., AUDIO_GENERATING, COMPLETED)
criterion.when: I click on the lesson row or a "View Script" action
criterion.then: I navigate to the Script Preview page at /courses/[slug]/lessons/[id]/script and the page loads the lesson data including the script array

criterion.given: I am on the Script Preview page
criterion.then: I see: Header Section (Back to Course link, Lesson title h1, Status badge, Last updated timestamp), Script Content Area (speak parts as paragraphs, pause parts as visual cues), Metrics Section (word count, estimated reading time, character count)

criterion.given: the script contains both speak and pause parts
criterion.then: speak parts are displayed as readable text blocks with line height 1.6, pause parts are visually distinct with styled badge showing [PAUSE Xs] where X is the duration

criterion.when: I look at the action buttons
criterion.then: I see: "Edit Script" button (primary cyan), "Generate Audio" button (enabled only if status is SCRIPT_COMPLETED, disabled otherwise with tooltip), "Regenerate Script" button (outline), "Back to Course" button (ghost)

criterion.given: the lesson does NOT have a completed script (status is PENDING, SCRIPT_GENERATING, or SCRIPT_FAILED)
criterion.when: I try to access the Script Preview page directly via URL
criterion.then: I see an empty state with icon, title "No script available", status-specific description, and CTA button "Back to Course"

criterion.given: I am on the Script Preview page
criterion.when: I view the page on mobile
criterion.then: layout adapts responsively (single column), action buttons stack vertically, script content remains readable

criterion.given: the API call to fetch lesson data fails
criterion.then: I see an error state with error icon, title "Failed to load script", error message, and "Try Again" button that refetches data

criterion.given: I click the "Back to Course" button
criterion.then: I am navigated back to /courses/[slug] (course detail page) and the lesson list is visible

doc.title: Senda CMS Architecture Document
doc.section: Container Pattern, API Architecture, Navigation Behavior
doc.snippet: All containers follow the pattern: index.tsx (presentation), connect.ts (business logic with $api queries/mutations), types.ts, constants.ts. Use openapi-react-query for all API calls.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.section: Empty State Patterns, Button Hierarchy, Color System
doc.snippet: Empty states include large icon (64px), clear title, helpful description, primary CTA. Primary buttons use cyan (#7dcfff), disabled states use grey background. Semantic colors: success (#9ece6a), warning (#e0af68), error (#f7768e).

doc.title: Epic Breakdown - Story 4.3
doc.section: Story 4.3: View and Preview Generated Script
doc.snippet: Script Editor page shows lesson title, script content with meditation cues highlighted ([PAUSE], [BREATHE]), word count and estimated reading time, action buttons for Edit, Generate Audio, Regenerate, Back to Course.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Preview generated scripts with edit capabilities post-generation. Progress tracking for script generation. Support for script versioning and regeneration.

file.reason: Core types for script parts (speak/pause) and lesson data including status
Auto-generated OpenAPI types - ScriptPartResponse has type (speak|pause), content (for speak), duration (for pause)
Reusable status badge component with semantic colors and icons for each lesson status
Reference for query pattern fetching lessons via $api.useQuery('get', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons')
Existing status constants for detecting generating states
Status classification helpers for button states - determine when Generate Audio should be enabled
Reference for script generation mutation pattern and optimistic updates
OpenAPI client for all API calls - use $api.useQuery and $api.useMutation
Use for pause duration display ([PAUSE Xs] styling)
Action buttons with variant props (default, secondary, outline, ghost, destructive)
Tooltip for disabled Generate Audio button explanation
Reference for route structure and param extraction pattern

node.usage: useQuery, useQueryClient for data fetching and cache management
Icons: ArrowLeft, FileText, RefreshCw, Volume2, Edit, AlertCircle, FileQuestion

constraints.constraint: Follow Container Pattern: page.tsx is minimal (delegates to container), connect.ts has ALL business logic (queries, mutations, navigation handlers), index.tsx is pure presentation
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useQuery from '@/lib/api' for all data fetching - never write manual fetch calls
Types from @/types/models: Import Lesson, ScriptPart types from models.ts, not directly from api.d.ts
Use shadcn/ui components: Button, Badge, Skeleton, Tooltip, Card from src/components/ui/
Tailwind CSS only: No CSS modules, use utility classes with responsive prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:)
WCAG AA compliance: All buttons have aria-labels, pause parts have accessible text, focus indicators visible (cyan ring)
Status-based rendering: Check lesson.status to determine what to show - only display script if status in [SCRIPT_COMPLETED, AUDIO_GENERATING, AUDIO_COMPLETED]
Use Next.js router: import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation' for programmatic navigation

interface.name: LessonData
interface.signature: { id: number, lessonNumber: number, title: string, corePractice: string, keyPoint: string, tone: string, durationMinutes: number, status: string, script?: ScriptPartResponse[] | null, audioUrl: string | null, scriptGeneratedAt: string | null, audioGeneratedAt: string | null, createdAt: string, updatedAt: string }

interface.name: ScriptPartResponse
interface.signature: { type: 'speak' | 'pause', content?: string | null, duration?: number | null }

interface.name: ScriptMetrics
interface.signature: { wordCount: number, charCount: number, readingTimeMinutes: number }

tests.standards: Type checking with `bun typecheck` (strict mode, noUncheckedIndexedAccess enabled). Linting with `bun lint:fix` (ESLint flat config with import ordering). Manual testing for all acceptance criteria. Pre-commit hooks run typecheck on all TS/TSX files.

ideas.idea: Unit test: calculateScriptMetrics returns correct word count, char count, reading time for mixed speak/pause script
Unit test: ScriptContent component renders speak parts as paragraphs and pause parts as badges
Unit test: Empty state component shows correct message for PENDING vs SCRIPT_GENERATING vs SCRIPT_FAILED status
Unit test: Generate Audio button is disabled when status !== SCRIPT_COMPLETED

implementationNotes.note: Create nested dynamic route: src/app/courses/[slug]/lessons/[id]/script/page.tsx Extract params with: const params = await props.params (Next.js 15 async params)

Fetch all lessons for the course, then find the specific lesson by ID. Query: $api.useQuery('get', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons', { params: { path: { slug } } }) Find lesson: lessons?.find(l => l.id === Number(id))

Word count: script.filter(p => p.type === 'speak').reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.content?.split(/\s+/).length || 0), 0) Char count: script.filter(p => p.type === 'speak').reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.content?.length || 0), 0) Reading time: Math.ceil(wordCount / 150) (meditation pace ~150 wpm)

SCRIPT_AVAILABLE_STATUSES = ['SCRIPT_COMPLETED', 'AUDIO_GENERATING', 'AUDIO_COMPLETED'] Show empty state if: !lesson?.script?.length || !SCRIPT_AVAILABLE_STATUSES.includes(lesson?.status) Enable Generate Audio only if: lesson?.status === 'SCRIPT_COMPLETED'

- src/app/courses/[slug]/lessons/[id]/script/page.tsx (minimal, delegates to container) - src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/index.tsx (presentation) - src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/connect.ts (business logic) - src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/types.ts (local types) - src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/constants.ts (status arrays, metrics config) - src/components/ScriptContent.tsx (optional, can be inline in container)

Story 4-2 implemented ScriptConfigModal and GenerateScriptButton. Reuse patterns from src/containers/Main/LessonScriptGeneration/ for status handling. StatusBadge component already exists at src/components/StatusBadge.tsx.
